No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly aims to equip students with diverse professional skills and new opportunities using AI, aligning strongly with Target 4.4 for relevant skills for employment.
evidence: 幫助同學具備更多元的專業
AI 也為我們廣告系和傳播設計同學帶來新的機會

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on technological upgrading and innovation (AI) to enhance productivity and create competitive services, directly aligning with Target 8.2.
evidence: 善用科技滿足客戶的需求
提供更吸引人、更具競爭力的服務

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core is the innovative application of AI technology to upgrade the design industry's capabilities, strongly supporting Target 9.5 on enhancing technological capabilities and innovation.
evidence: 生成式AI 科技嚴重衝擊著傳播、設計產業
善用AI科技簡化工作流程

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course notes AI enables 'untrained people' to create, suggesting a minor, inferred link to democratizing creative tools and reducing skill-based inequalities (Target 10.3).
evidence: 沒有受過任何專業訓練的人也能透過對話的方式創作出極具說服力的作品

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The syllabus explicitly instructs students to respect intellectual property rights, directly supporting the promotion of the rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's focus on utilizing advanced AI tools (ICT) for professional development has a minimal, inferred link to enhancing the use of enabling technology (Target 17.8).
evidence: 認識 Photoshp、Lightroom 最新的AI功能
